description: Posts featuring detailed descriptions of specific menu items with dish names, locations, ingredient highlights, and personal recommendations in bilingual Arabic-English format.
structural_recipe: Structure post with: (1) Restaurant name in Arabic and English, (2) Location with neighborhood details, (3) Restaurant category/cuisine type, (4) Attribution to food reviewer/photographer, (5) 'Orders/Recommendations' section listing specific dishes, (6) Personal commentary on quality/taste with emoji ratings, (7) Focus on premium/signature items with Arabic-English dish names
why_it_works: Saudi audiences value expert curation and detailed quality assessment. Bilingual presentation shows sophistication and accessibility. Specific menu items with personal endorsement build trust and reduce decision friction for potential diners. Location specificity and reviewer attribution establish credibility in competitive F&B market.
transplantation_caveats: Requires authentic food expertise or credible reviewer attribution to avoid appearing promotional without substance
Bilingual execution must be natural—poor Arabic or English translation damages credibility
High-quality food photography essential to support detailed descriptions
Must include specific location details valued in Saudi context (neighborhood names, district)
cultural_constraints: Include halal certification or implicit halal assurance when relevant
Respect prayer times and cultural dining customs in commentary
Avoid alcohol references despite international cuisine contexts
